changes: 📱 Redesigned splash screen and integrated a dynamic intro video.
🐛 Fixed navigation error and white screen issue during phone authentication.
⚡ Removed loading delay when sending OTPs for instant user feedback.
🔧 Optimized App Tour: Disabled auto-start on fresh installs and fixed tooltip positioning.
🎨 Enhanced UI elements including the new launcher icon and login toggle switch.
🚀 Added a beautiful 'Cloud to Phone' data flying animation during app updates.
🌈 Improved the update download progress bar with a dynamic Red-to-Green gradient.
🔒 Introduced App Lock feature using device screen credentials (PIN, Pattern, or Biometrics).
⚙️ Configurable auto-lock timeout options (Immediately, 15 seconds, 1 minute, 5 minutes, 15 minutes).
💡 Smart Setup Prompt to remind users to enable App Lock for data security, with direct settings navigation.
🌐 Added official developer website (amorsoftlab.github.io) in About Developers section.
📱 Restructured and fixed splash screen layout, resolving stretched logo and hidden loading indicators on APK/mobile.
🛠️ Fixed Firebase App Check startup crash on non-supported desktop platforms (like Windows).
📅 Redesigned Slot Availability calendar with rounded cells, custom badges, and border-less layout.
✨ Toggle options to show Hijri and Malayalam dates inside calendar cells.
🔍 Clicking a booked date now displays its booking details below the calendar with quick navigation.
📤 Sharing calendar image now includes the heading, calendar, legend, and white borders to avoid cropping.
🔄 Interactive Updates checker with a beautiful phone-to-cloud data sync animation.
🛠️ Fixed calendar days-of-week header layout overflows and restored Back Button visibility on the About Developers page.
✨ Add Booking Screen simplified: Date & Client info are now smoothly combined on the first screen.
📊 Dashboard now shows live monthly booking trends compared to the previous month.
🎨 Polished UI colors: Removed unexpected grey backgrounds in Dashboard and Account screens for a cleaner look.
🚀 Fixed app splash screen logo clipping on Android 12+ devices.
📱 App Launcher icon updated to ensure consistency.
✨ Combined client details and event selection into a single simplified screen.
📍 Added a mandatory 'Place' field under client details to capture location info.
🎨 Redesigned confirm booking screen into sleek 2-column glass-morphism cards.
💬 Directly launch WhatsApp after booking confirmation without separate popups.
✨ Fully integrated custom full-color icons (Wedding, Nikkah, Engagement, Bride, Groom, Ring).
📱 Optimized spacing and layouts across dialogs to prevent scrolling on standard screens.
✨ Never miss an alert! Notifications are now safely saved even after you close the app.
🚀 Tap and go: Clicking a notification now takes you directly to the right screen.
🎨 Enjoy a smoother, visually pleasing animation when pulling to refresh the dashboard.
✨ Upgraded the bottom menu with a fresh new interactive bounce effect.
🛠️ Improved reliability and fixed minor bugs when checking for new app updates.
Added a dedicated 'Updates & Changelog' screen.
Integrated custom fonts including Gilroy globally.
In-app update checks now fetch directly from GitHub Releases API.
Initial release of the Event Desk Android application.
